description: DataRef whose `embedded` sub-object contains an unknown field. The `embedded` sub-schema is CLOSED (additionalProperties: false; see acdp-data-ref.schema.json line 85 and the openness map in RFC-ACDP-0007 §3.3.1). Registries MUST reject the publish at schema validation (RFC-ACDP-0003 §2.1 step 1).

expected.rationale: The embedded object is a tightly-scoped wire shape: encoding and content. New embedding semantics (different encodings, attached metadata) require an explicit schema bump, not field-level extensibility. Note: the SURROUNDING DataRef root object is an OPEN schema (additionalProperties: true — see RFC-ACDP-0002 §6.7 and fixture can-010); this fixture targets the closed `embedded` sub-object specifically.
